---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a layout, style, renderer, adapter, or workflow improvement.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Request / 需求

Describe the requested improvement.

请描述你希望增加或改进的功能。

## User Scenario / 使用场景

Who needs this feature and in what workflow?

谁会使用这个功能？用于什么工作流？

## Suggested Behavior / 期望行为

Describe the expected behavior or output.

请描述期望的行为或输出结果。

## Output Formats / 相关输出格式

- [ ] PPTX
- [ ] SVG
- [ ] Draw.io
- [ ] Excalidraw
- [ ] Mermaid
- [ ] HTML
- [ ] Markdown
- [ ] JSON
- [ ] Agent adapter

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Add examples, route sketches, or references if they are public and reusable.

如有公开且可复用的例子、草图或参考资料，可以补充。
